overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along an elevated pedestrian walkway through Night City at night. The scene features dense neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, moderate traffic, and other pedestrians in a futuristic cyberpunk urban environment with vibrant pink and cyan lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with orange textured surface

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated walkway toward the neon-lit city center, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction along the walkway
person sitting on a bench facing the traffic below

entered.detail: raised pedestrian path with distinctive orange textured paving tiles
metal guardrail separating walkway from drop-off on the right side
large illuminated billboard displaying ChroManticore advertisement
massive digital billboard showing a woman's face with purple hair
tall palm trees lining the right side of the walkway
busy street with multiple lanes of traffic running parallel to the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated orange-tiled pedestrian walkway at night, with a metal railing on the right and busy multi-lane traffic on the left. Neon billboards and holographic advertisements illuminate the scene, including a prominent digital screen displaying a woman's face. Other pedestrians walk ahead and a person sits on a bench to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with yellow crosswalk markings

events.description: character steps onto the yellow-striped crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane street
white van and other vehicles pass through the intersection as the character crosses

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide street at the marked crosswalk while navigating through moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic

notable_agents.action: white van driving through the intersection from left to right
group of pedestrians crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing marked with thick yellow parallel lines
open intersection area where the walkway meets the road at grade

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide street intersection as the character descends to street level. The character crosses the asphalt road using a yellow-striped crosswalk while vehicles including a white van pass through the intersection. The large digital billboard remains visible in the distance to the left, and the crowd density increases with multiple pedestrians crossing together.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with covered transit shelter

events.description: character reaches the far sidewalk and transitions back onto the elevated walkway system

agents.ego_description: continuing along the elevated walkway past a covered bus shelter structure on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the walkway toward the distant skyline

entered.detail: covered transit shelter with curved roof and illuminated interior
overhead canopy structure providing partial cover over the walkway

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character continues along the elevated walkway which now features a covered bus shelter on the right side. The orange paving returns underfoot, and the metal railing continues along the right edge. The futuristic skyline remains prominent ahead, with neon-lit skyscrapers and digital billboards illuminating the night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from an elevated walkway into a bustling street intersection before returning to a raised pedestrian path. It begins on an orange-tiled walkway flanked by a metal railing and heavy traffic, where neon billboards and a large holographic face cast a vibrant glow over passing pedestrians. As the character moves forward, the scene opens into a wide intersection where the camera descends to street level, crossing a yellow-striped asphalt road amidst a crowd of people and passing vehicles. The perspective then shifts back upward as the character ascends to a new section of the elevated walkway, passing a covered bus shelter. Finally, the view settles back onto the orange paving, looking ahead toward a dense skyline of neon-lit skyscrapers and digital advertisements.
